content.full_text:
City of Pico Rivera

6615 PASSONS BOULEVARD • PICO RIVERA, CALIFORNIA 90660
P.O. Box 1016                    (213) 942-2000 • (213) 723-3191

July 19, 1990


Fair Political Practice Committee
Att: John H. Larson, Chairman
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA    95814

Dear Mr. Larson:

I respectfully request information concerning the propriety and legality of
an expenditure of $800 of personal use campaign funds. I have been a
member of the Pico Rivera City Council since 1982 and was re-elected to a
four year term on April 10, 1990. I have a balance of $800 remaining in my
campaign fund and I need to know if I can make an expenditure in the
following manner.

A donation of the entire amount would be made to the Pico Rivera Sister
City Committee to assist them in carrying out their function. The Sister
City Committee is  a body comprised of fifteen persons appointed by the
City Council to maintain a sister city relationship with a city in Mexico.
Some of the specific functions of the committee are cultural exchange
program, student exchange program, teacher exchange program, assisting the
sister city in Mexico by providing them with fire fighting equipment,
ambulances and other rescue equipment. The foregoing is only a partial
list of the work performed by the committee.

The City Council allocates $1,750 annually to help defray some operational
costs of the committee. The committee conducts three or four fund raising
events to finance their work. My contribution to the committee would be to
assist them in carrying out their charter.

Please inform me at an early opportunity if this expenditure of personal
campaign funds is possible.

Sincerely,

Alberto Natividad
Mayor

AN/dlm

City of Pico Rivera

6615 PASSONS BOULEVARD - PICO RIVERA, CALIFORNIA 90660
P.O. Box 1016                    (213) 942-2000 • (213) 723-3191


July 23, 1990


Fair Political Practice Committee
Attn: John H. Larson, Chairman
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA  95814              RE:  ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
                                       CONCERNING JULY 1990 LETTER

Dear Mr. Larson:

The purpose of this letter is to provide you with additional information
which I neglected to include in my letter to your office dated July 19,
1990. In that letter, I asked for information concerning the propriety of
donating $800 in "personal use" campaign funds to the Pico Rivera Sister
City Committee.

I neglected to state that this committee is a charitable and a non-profit
committee as embraced by Section 501-C of the IRS Code.

Thank you for your consideration in this matter.

Sincerely,

Alberto Natividad
Mayor

AN/dlm

[illegible] [illegible] [illegible] [illegible]
